title: Authentication, Passwords, Sessions, Cookies, and JOSE · TypeScript Build Room
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first credential verification and principal-construction contract for authentication, passwords, sessions, cookies, and jose. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of credential verification and principal-construction contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation.
Generate opaque session identifiers, store server-side state, rotate at authentication and privilege changes, expire idle and absolute lifetime, revoke, and prevent fixation.
Use jose verification with explicit algorithms, trusted keys, issuer, audience, expiration, not-before, clock tolerance, token type, and bounded claim validation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Password Verifier Policy
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 2825 in a administrative API crossing two identity and network trust zones. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate bounded token claims and session rotation before constructing a principal; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then change the tenant and prove denial before repository access. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Password Verifier Policy.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation. For Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Password Verifier Policy, keep Password Verifier Policy connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Defend the transferred model · Workshop Authentication Principal Audit
steps.instruction:
Write the workshop evidence note for Authentication Principal Audit: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A workshop team handles case 6254 in a administrative API crossing two identity and network trust zones. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate bounded token claims and session rotation before constructing a principal; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then change the method and preserve both status and durable-effect evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Construct the smallest principal after full credential validation and record redacted success, failure class, rotation, revocation, and recovery evidence.

Evidence target: Node and Express server Defend the transferred model · Workshop Authentication Principal Audit.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Construct the smallest principal after full credential validation and record redacted success, failure class, rotation, revocation, and recovery evidence.
